_comment: DM Room Type library — ONLY ASHRAE 62.1-2022, FBC 2023 Table 403.3.1.1, and ASHRAE 170-2021. Name encodes ventilation and ends with the building code: cfm rooms '<space> Rp/Ra [*exh Exh] (621|FBC)'; 170 rooms '<space> outdoorACH/totalACH ACH [Exh] (170)'. Enum legend: ventilation type 0=ACH,1=CFM/person,2=CFM/ft2,3=none,5=same-as-cooling; people 0=count,1=ft2/person; lighting 1=W/ft2; equipment sensible 0=total W,1=W/ft2.

_defaults.note: lighting/equipment/people-loads/infiltration are DM defaults, not from the code tables. Only OA, total ACH (170), occupant density, design temp/RH, pressure (170), exhaust (FBC) are code-sourced.
